data.title: Faropoint Closes $223M Refinancing for Fund III Industrial Portfolio
data.description: In Hoboken, New Jersey, Faropoint has successfully completed a $223 million refinancing deal with Blackstone Real Estate Debt Strategies for their Fund III Industrial Portfolio. This marks the third financing arrangement between Faropoint and BREDS, showcasing a strong ongoing partnership between the two entities.

data.title: Stablecoin debate: Who profits? Issuers & exchanges benefit from infrastructure; velocity outweighs market cap in digital finance.
data.description: The stablecoin infrastructure is proving to be efficient by increasing the circulation speed of digital dollars, leading to faster transactions. However, the main beneficiaries of this system are the stablecoin issuers and exchanges who are profiting from the rent generated. This highlights a shift where the speed of transactions is becoming more important than the market capitalization of stablecoins, indicating that digital dollars are increasingly functioning as a seamless financial tool rather than a standalone asset.

data.title: HSS Opens Kellen Tower, Completing Major Upper East Side Campus Expansion
data.description: In New York, the Hospital for Special Surgery (HSS) revealed the launch of Kellen Tower, a groundbreaking facility spanning 94,000 square feet and reaching 12 stories high. Overlooking the East River and situated above the FDR Drive, this new development elevates HSS's ability to deliver specialized orthopedic care. The unveiling of Kellen Tower signifies a significant achievement in the revamp of HSS's Upper East Side campus. Additionally, the tower is positioned adjacent to the...

data.title: Are APLS, CNTA, BIRD Obtaining Fair Deals for their Shareholders?
data.description: Individuals with insider information have the potential to receive significant financial advantages that regular shareholders do not have access to. The planned deals could include conditions that restrict better competing bids. Shareholders are advised to reach out to the company to explore their rights and choices at zero expense or fee.

data.title: object studio’s Bella Loyalty Platform Integrates with Optimove to Deliver Omnichannel Customer Journeys
data.description: In Austin, Texas, the Bella Loyalty Platform by object studio has partnered with Optimove to provide seamless omnichannel customer journeys. This integration aims to enhance customer experiences across various platforms.

data.title: Deutsche Lufthansa AG: Release according to Article 40 (1) of the WpHG (the German Securities Trading Act) with the objective of Europe-wide distribution
data.description: Lufthansa AG has issued a press release in compliance with Article 40 (1) of the German Securities Trading Act (WpHG) for widespread distribution across Europe.
Agreement reached on payment for sale of Offset Solutions division with significant sum involved.

data.title: DEME announces start of new share buyback program
data.description: Following the approval from shareholders at the Extraordinary General Meeting on May 21, 2025, DEME Group NV's Board of Directors has announced the commencement of a new share repurchase program.

data.title: Merlin Expands Executive Team Appointing Michael Baker as Chief Marketing Officer
data.description: An experienced marketing professional has recently joined a newly publicly traded company to spearhead brand strategy and emphasize the significance of AI-driven autonomy within the realms of defense and civil aviation. The individual brings valuable expertise to the company, and the move is expected to have a significant impact on their marketing approach. This strategic decision highlights the company's focus on leveraging advanced technology, particularly AI, within the defense and civil aviation sectors.

data.title: TDIndustries Awarded Three National Construction Honors by Associated Builders and Contractors
data.description: On March 31, 2026 in Dallas, TDIndustries (TD), a leading provider of facilities services and mechanical construction, was honored with three prestigious national Excellence in Construction® (EIC) Awards at the ABC Convention 2026 held in Salt Lake City on March 19. These awards mark a significant achievement for TD as they were among the 86 recipients recognized at the event.

data.title: Extell Development Company Appoints Andrew Chung as President and Co-Chief Executive Officer
data.description: Extell Development Company, a leading real estate development firm in the US, revealed on March 31, 2026, that Andrew Chung is now the President and Co-Chief Executive Officer. Chung will be working alongside Gary Barnett, Extell's Founder and Chairman. This partnership aims to bring new leadership to the company.

data.title: Reduction of government bond series in connection with the settlement of the ÍL Fund
data.description: The Treasury has acquired its own bonds from the ÍL Fund as part of the settlement process. This move effectively reduces the outstanding amount of government bonds listed on the stock exchange. The specific number of bonds involved in this transaction was not disclosed but it is aimed at streamlining the Fund's holdings and optimizing the government's bond portfolio. This acquisition will have an impact on the total value of the series in the market, marking a significant development in the handling of government securities.

data.title: Cell Therapy Market Size to Surpass USD 17.15 Billion by 2032, Driven by Chronic Disease Treatment and CAR-T Therapy Growth, Says New MMR Analysis
data.description: In Pune, India, as of March 31, 2026, the global market size for Cell Therapy was reported at USD 6.37 billion in 2025. Projections indicate a significant growth trajectory with a projected Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 15.2% from 2026 to 2032, aiming to reach close to USD 17.15 billion. The Cell Therapy Market from 2026-2032 is in focus, exploring the impact of technologies like CAR-T, CRISPR, and AI.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Rallies As Trump Looks To End War; McCormick Makes This Big Move (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Tuesday, the Dow Jones index experienced a significant increase following President Trump's comments regarding the situation with Iran, with oil prices showing volatility. The stock market today saw the Dow rallying as Trump signals potential plans to end the conflict with Iran. McCormick also made a major strategic move. Live coverage highlighted these developments in the market.

data.title: Mediaspace Health Launches to Deliver Innovative Media Strategies for Agencies, Pharma and Healthcare Brands
data.description: Mediaspace Solutions, a prominent independent media planning and buying agency, has introduced Mediaspace Health, a specialized division focusing on healthcare media planning. With decades of industry expertise, Mediaspace Health is set to provide comprehensive services in this sector. The launch was announced on March 31, 2026, in Minneapolis. The agency's proven track record and dedication to precision in media planning make them a valuable resource in the healthcare advertising realm.

data.title: Loeb Welcomes Jackie De La Fuente as Controller, Strengthening Financial Leadership Team
data.description: In Chicago on March 31, 2026, Jackie De La Fuente was announced as the new Controller at Loeb. With over 20 years of experience in financial operations, including 13 years in Asset-Based Lending, Jackie brings a wealth of expertise to the team. Throughout her career, she has overseen accounting functions, enhanced internal controls, and established herself as a seasoned professional in the industry.

data.title: Mitchell Hamline advances as finalists in National Patent Application Drafting Competition
data.description: In St. Paul, Minnesota on March 31, 2026, the Mitchell Hamline School of Law showcased outstanding student skills and alumni knowledge in intellectual property law at the regional round of the National Patent Application Drafting Competition. The event saw participation from over a specific number of individuals.

data.title: Plancorp Announces First Major Acquisition in 40+ Years, Adding $1B in Client Assets, Fresno Office
data.description: On March 31, 2026, Plancorp Wealth Management of St. Louis revealed its latest acquisition. The firm, a prominent fee-only wealth management company, has recently bought Regency Investment Advisors, Inc., an independent Registered Investment Advisor based in Fresno, California. This acquisition marks a significant move for both companies, expanding Plancorp's national presence and further solidifying Regency's position in the wealth management sector.
Turkish presidency: ‘Our President, His Excellency Recep Tayyip Erdoğan, received Palestinian Deputy President Hussein al-Sheikh at the Presidential Complex.’
